parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({"model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a content quality editor and fact-checker for payment processing and ecommerce knowledge documents.

Output the validated content as clean Markdown, then output the separator ---FACT-CHECK--- on its own line, then your fact-check analysis.

Content validation rules:
- Correct factual inaccuracies
- Improve clarity and professional tone for financial services audiences
- Remove unsupported or speculative claims
- Maintain original structure and approximate length
- Strip any ## level headings from the start of the content (they are injected separately by the assembly step and must not appear in the body)
- Preserve all ### and #### sub-headings exactly - do NOT strip or modify these
- Preserve all lists, tables, and structured formatting
- Keep citation markers [1][2][3] etc. after the claims they support
- Remove or replace any mention of the following brands with a generic description (e.g. 'a payment provider', 'a payment gateway', 'a direct debit provider'): Stripe, Checkout, Nuvie, Mollie, Worldpay, Trust Payments, GoCardless, PayPoint, Barclaycard Payments, Lloyds Cardnet, Opayo, DNA Payments, Cashflows, takepayments, Elavon UK — note any replacements made in the analysis

Output format: validated Markdown content first, then ---FACT-CHECK--- on its own line, then the analysis. No JSON. No code fences."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Document: "" + $('Split Sections').item.json.title + ""
Topic: " + $('Split Sections').item.json.topic + "
Section heading: " + $('Split Sections').item.json.heading + "
Section type: " + $('Split Sections').item.json.section_type + "

Content to fact-check:

" + ($json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'No content generated.') + "

Source references (verify claims against these URLs):
" + (($json.citations || []).map((url, i) => '[' + (i+1) + '] ' + url).join('
') || 'No source URLs provided by the search engine.')}], "temperature": 0.2, "max_tokens": 6000}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ formId: 'FegEaspVaKyiU4S6TN55', fields: { markdown: { ai: { prompt: $('Extract Retry Data').isExecuted ? ($('Extract Retry Data').first().json.edited_prompt || $('Fetch System Prompt').first().json.value) : ($('Assemble Draft Document').first().json.edited_prompt || $('Fetch System Prompt').first().json.value) }, content: $('Assemble Draft Document').first().json.fact_check_report + '

---

<!-- DOC_START -->

' + $('Assemble Draft Document').first().json.draft_markdown } }, meta: { _gthTitle: $('Assemble Draft Document').first().json.topic }, webhookUrl: $execution.resumeUrl, updateForReviewId: $('Extract Retry Data').isExecuted ? ($('Extract Retry Data').first().json.review_id || null) : null }) }}

parameters.name: approved_content
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const strip = t => t.replace(/\[\d+\]/g, '').replace(/ {2,}/g, ' '); const v = $json.responseValues?.markdown?.value; const raw = (typeof v === 'string' && v) ? v : (v && typeof v === 'object' && v.content) ? v.content : ($('Assemble Draft Document').first().json.draft_markdown || ''); const marker = '<!-- DOC_START -->'; const idx = raw.indexOf(marker); const doc = idx >= 0 ? raw.slice(idx + marker.length).trim() : raw; return strip(doc); })() }}

nodes.name: Update Status → In Review + Store Review URL

values.content:
You are a document structure expert specializing in SEO-optimized content. Generate ONLY a JSON object with no additional text.

The JSON must have:
- title (string): SEO-optimized title
- sections (array of {heading, description}): Main content sections incorporating relevant keywords
- faqs (array of {question}): Questions to answer, prioritizing People Also Ask questions
- target_keywords (array of strings): Primary keywords to target

=Create a comprehensive document outline for: "{{ $json.topic }}"

Category: {{ $json.category || 'General' }}

--- SEO ENRICHMENT DATA ---

Keyword Suggestions (by search volume):
{{ $json.seo_enrichment.keyword_suggestions.map(k => `- ${k.keyword} (vol: ${k.search_volume}, competition: ${k.competition})`).join('\n') || 'No keyword data available' }}

People Also Ask Questions:
{{ $json.seo_enrichment.people_also_ask.map(p => `- ${p.question}`).join('\n') || 'No PAA data available' }}

Related Searches:
{{ $json.seo_enrichment.related_searches.join(', ') || 'No related searches' }}

--- INSTRUCTIONS ---
1. Use high-volume keywords in section headings where natural
2. Include ALL People Also Ask questions in the FAQs section
3. Structure sections to comprehensively cover the topic and related keywords
4. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown or explanation

main.node: Update Status → In Review + Store Review URL
